query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Diagonal streaks of colored light in blue, orange, green, and yellow traverse a dark background, creating linear trails of varying lengths and intensities that cross the frame at shallow angles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Diagonal streaks of colored light in blue, orange, green, and yellow traverse a dark background, rendered as elongated motion-blurred trails through intentional camera movement or long exposure, dissolving any identifiable light sources into abstract linear forms that favor color and gesture over recognizable subject matter.
